svg.title: AI Call Quality Analytics — hybrid cloud architecture
svg.desc: Azure B2s on the left runs FastAPI, PostgreSQL, Redis, MinIO, worker_io and Flower. A local Windows machine with RTX 3060 Ti on the right runs worker_gpu connected via encrypted SSH tunnel. Both workers call Groq and OpenRouter LLM APIs.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the browser proxy through Vite to reach the Azure API?')
sendPrompt('What routes does the FastAPI service expose?')
sendPrompt('How does Redis work as a Celery broker for the pipeline?')
sendPrompt('Why is audio stored in MinIO instead of the database?')
sendPrompt('What pipeline stages does worker_io handle?')
sendPrompt('What does Flower show on its dashboard?')
sendPrompt('What does worker_gpu do and why is concurrency forced to 1?')
sendPrompt('Which Groq model does the pipeline use for inference?')
sendPrompt('When does OpenRouter activate as LLM fallback?')
